section.title: NAME
section.p: getRG - Return the quotation of a ReplicaGroup.

section.title: DESCRIPTION
section.p: Return the quotation of a ReplicaGroup.

plentry.pd: ReplicaGroup name. ReplicaGroup names are unique to each other in a database object.

ReplicaGroup id. The system will automatically generate a ReplicaGroup id.
Format The method "getRG()" contains "name" or "id". The type of "name" is string. The type of "id" is "int". It the ReplicaGroup specified by "name" or "id" doesn't exist, operation exception will occur. ("<ReplicaGroup name>"|<id>)

ul.li: The value of "name" should not contain null string, "." or "$". The length of it should not be greater than 127B.

section.title: Examples
section.p: Specify the value of "name", the return of ReplicaGroup "rg1".
Specify the value of "id", the return of ReplicaGroup "rg1".
